metadata.name: Double strike — deals damage in both first strike and normal damage steps
metadata.description: A creature with double strike participates in both the first-strike combat damage step and the normal combat damage step. It deals its power in damage twice. Tests CR 702.4: double strike.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.4a: Double strike is both first strike and regular strike. Creature deals damage in first combat damage step AND second. Informational script only.

script.step_note: Creature with double strike attacks unblocked.

actions.description: First strike damage step: double-strike attacker deals power to defending player
actions.note: CR 702.4a: Double strike creature participates in first combat damage step.

actions.description: Normal damage step: double-strike attacker deals power again
actions.note: CR 702.4a: Double strike creature also participates in second combat damage step. Total damage = 2x power.
